name: Open WebUI — Docker Compose with Ollama
description: Full stack Open WebUI + Ollama with persistent volumes.
content:
services:
  ollama:
    image: ollama/ollama:latest
    volumes:
      - ollama-data:/root/.ollama
    restart: unless-stopped

  open-webui:
    image: ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main
    ports:
      - "3000:8080"
    environment:
      - OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://ollama:11434
      - OPENAI_API_KEY=${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}
      - WEBUI_AUTH=True
    volumes:
      - webui-data:/app/backend/data
    depends_on:
      - ollama
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  ollama-data:
  webui-data:

name: Open WebUI — Cloud API only
description: Open WebUI connecting to cloud APIs only (no local Ollama).
content:
services:
  open-webui:
    image: ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main
    ports:
      - "3000:8080"
    environment:
      - OPENAI_API_BASE_URL=https://api.openai.com/v1
      - OPENAI_API_KEY=${OPENAI_API_KEY}
      - WEBUI_AUTH=True
      - WEBUI_NAME=My AI Hub
    volumes:
      - webui-data:/app/backend/data
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  webui-data:
